DP.121.0000:
And there do I see my father.
My son. My life.\f
And there do I see nature.
Pokémon. The world.
DP.121.0001:
The art of crafting things fatigues
one’s spirit.\f
When the spirit is healed, the desire
to make something returns.\f
It is such a wondrous cycle.
DP.121.0002:
When people and Pokémon join hands,
everyone’s happy.\f
It makes everyone come together.
It could even make the world one!
DP.121.0003:
That people are lonely is only natural.
It gives me compassion for others.\f
It’s what makes me look forward to
a better tomorrow.\f
But there are still moments of
fondness for the past.\r
Though, time can heal some sadness...
DP.121.0004:
There are still words that not everyone
can describe...\r
The words are “love” and “joy.”
DP.121.0005:
Pokémon... People... It’s only natural
that we are all so very different.\f
Make sure that you never judge
a Pokémon on if it’s weak or strong.\f
You must always look for the good
inside of them. That’s what counts!
